guide_spacings_desc: Definitions for Spacings and Border Radius to maintain consistent layouts and shapes.
guide_spacings_focus_desc: The stroke width and offset spacing of the outline displayed upon focus to ensure accessibility (such as clarifying the current location during keyboard operation).
guide_spacings_guideline_1: The base 1rem follows the browser standard (typically 16px).
guide_spacings_guideline_2: Use CSS variables like var(--spacing-md) for spacings; do not use direct numerical values.
guide_spacings_guideline_3: Use different border radii depending on the component size (Button: sm/md, Card: lg).
guide_spacings_margin_desc: Use CSS variables like `var(--spacing-md)`, do not hardcode values.
guide_spacings_radius_desc: Use according to component size (Button: sm/md, Card: lg).
perf_animation_desc: For components involving continuous or complex animations, we use the CSS `will-change` property to give the browser a hint for optimization.
perf_animation_micro_interactions_desc: Applied to small but frequent interactions like `Switch` toggles and `Accordion` expansions to ensure lag-free feedback.
perf_animation_note_desc: Use sparingly as it consumes memory and GPU resources. Avoid using on too many small elements simultaneously.
perf_resource_desc: In the `Image` component, we've introduced a `priority` prop. When set to `true`, it applies `fetchpriority="high"` to the underlying `img` tag.
perf_resource_usage_desc: For the largest image above-the-fold (LCP - Largest Contentful Paint).
perf_resource_benefit_desc: Informs the browser to prioritize this image over other non-critical resources.
